expectations.text: With-skill subagent called TeamCreate to create a swarm-* team
expectations.evidence: TeamCreate succeeded — team config created at /Users/lukelee/.claude/teams/rocky-eval9/config.json with team_name='rocky-eval9'

expectations.text: With-skill subagent called Agent(team_name=..., name=...) for at least one teammate (not bash-spawned claude --dangerously-skip-permissions)
expectations.evidence: AGENT_CALLS_INVOKED: 0/3. The Agent tool with team_name parameter is NOT exposed to general-purpose subagents — STRUCTURAL CONSTRAINT, not a runtime error. This is the key discovery of eval-9: Native AgentTeam can only be invoked from the top-level orchestrator session, not from a subagent. (See eval-9b for the parent-context test that succeeds.)

expectations.text: All 3 teammates were dispatched (3 separate Agent calls with team_name)
expectations.evidence: 0/3 — same structural constraint. Subagent fell back to direct implementation.

expectations.text: All 3 .result files were written with Status: DONE
expectations.evidence: All 3 .result files exist with Status: DONE — but written by the orchestrating subagent itself as a fallback, not by Native AgentTeam teammates
slug.py, trunc.py, norm.py all exist — written by subagent fallback
Functional verification: normalize('  hello   world  ') = 'hello world'

expectations.text: With-skill subagent called TeamDelete on cleanup
expectations.evidence: TeamDelete returned 'Cleaned up directories and worktrees for team rocky-eval9'

claims.claim: Agent(team_name=...) is not in the general-purpose subagent toolset
claims.evidence: Subagent's report: 'The harness exposes Agent(team_name=...) only to the top-level orchestrator session — not to subagents.' Verified by inspecting the subagent's tool list. This is a HARNESS-LEVEL CONSTRAINT that the rocky skill must document.

claims.claim: TeamCreate, SendMessage, and TeamDelete ARE available to subagents
claims.evidence: Subagent successfully called all 3 from inside its own context

suggestions.reason: This eval discovered a critical constraint: Native AgentTeam dispatch (Phase 3.2.2) is not reachable from a subagent context. The rocky skill MUST document this and provide a fallback. I have updated phase-3-dispatch.md to add this constraint and the fallback path.

eval_feedback.overall: Most discriminating eval in iter-2 — discovered a structural constraint via failure. The 'failure' is actually the most valuable signal in the test set.
